qrCodeDialog.title: Scan QR Code
qrCodeDialog.description: Use your phone to scan this QR code.
qrCodeDialog.scanWithPhone: Please use your phone camera to scan this QR code.
qrCodeDialog.step1: 1. Open the camera on your phone
qrCodeDialog.step3: 3. Open the link in your browser after recognition

welcome.selectExistingOrDiscover: Select an existing device or discover a new one to start messaging.
welcome.discoverFirstDevice: Discover your first device to get started.
welcome.selectDeviceToStartMessaging: Select a device to start messaging

deviceDiscover.title: Devices Discover
deviceDiscover.ensureSameNetwork: Please ensure that the desired target is also on the same Wi-Fi network.

navDevices.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this chat conversation. All associated chat history will be permanently deleted from the database—not just removed from the cache—and cannot be recovered.

manage.knownDevicesInfo: All devices currently known by Synclan.

profile.name: Name
profile.enterNameAndPhoto: Enter your name and add a profile photo.

settings.title: Settings
settings.restartDescription: Some changes require a restart to take effect. Synclan will restart now.

certificateTrustHelp.macOS: HTTPS requires the Synclan certificate to be trusted. Export the certificate, import it into Keychain Access, set it to Always Trust, then restart Synclan before enabling HTTPS.
certificateTrustHelp.linux: HTTPS requires the Synclan certificate to be trusted. Export the certificate, import it into your system trust store, then restart Synclan before enabling HTTPS.
certificateTrustHelp.default: HTTPS requires the Synclan certificate to be trusted by your operating system. Export the certificate, add it to the trusted certificates, then restart Synclan before enabling HTTPS.

updater.checkFailedDescription: Please check your network connection and try again.
updater.updateDescription: Update to enjoy a better experience with the latest improvements and fixes.
updater.installFailed: Update installation failed. Please try again.

message.deleteDescription: This will permanently delete this message from the database. This action cannot be undone, and the message will also be removed from the other device.
